narrative:
83 Ohio House district has 78,316 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.5 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -12.9% D−R vs -37.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
